seoTitle: Casterton vs Castle Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Casterton and Castle Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Casterton vs Castle Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Casterton and Castle Creek.
heading: Casterton vs Castle Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Casterton, Victoria and Castle Creek, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Casterton has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Castle Creek (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Casterton or Castle Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Casterton has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Castle Creek scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Casterton scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Castle Creek scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Casterton or Castle Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Casterton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
